books.title: Zuni Folktales
books.author: Frank Hamilton Cushing
books.summary: A collection of folktales from the Zuni culture.

books.title: The Lone Wolf
books.author: Louis Joseph Vance
books.summary: A skilled thief, pursued for his past crimes, is faced with a choice between love or a life of crime.

books.title: A Daughter of the Samurai
books.author: Etsu Inagaki Sugimoto
books.summary: The autobiography of Etsu Sugimoto, a girl born into a samurai family in a time of great cultural changes.

books.title: The Lives and Opinions of Eminent Philosophers
books.author: Diogenes Laërtius
books.summary: Brief biographies of the prominent philosophers of ancient Greece.

books.title: The Water-Babies
books.author: Charles Kingsley
books.summary: A young, uneducated, and mistreated chimney sweep is reborn as a denizen of the fairy world, beginning a journey of moral and spiritual growth.

books.title: Psmith in the City
books.author: P. G. Wodehouse
books.summary: A young man abandons his dream of playing cricket at Cambridge because of financial trouble and goes to work for a London bank, where he’s joined by an unflappable friend.

books.title: Measure for Measure
books.author: William Shakespeare
books.summary: A duke pretends to leave Vienna so that he can observe his deputy’s management during his supposed absence.

books.title: The Return
books.author: Walter de la Mare
books.summary: After visiting a graveyard, a man finds his appearance has mysteriously changed.

books.title: Mr. Standfast
books.author: John Buchan
books.summary: An army general chases a network of German spies through Scotland, the Swiss Alps, and the First World War’s Western Front.

books.title: The Beetle
books.author: Richard Marsh
books.summary: A group of middle-class Victorians find themselves pitted against an ancient Egyptian evil.

books.title: Sailing Alone Around the World
books.author: Joshua Slocum
books.summary: A sailor gives his account how he completed the first solo sailing voyage around the world.

books.title: The Bellamy Trial
books.author: Frances Noyes Hart
books.summary: A man and a woman are on trial for the murder of his wife, her friend.

books.title: How the Other Half Lives
books.author: Jacob Riis
books.summary: A social reformer documents the living conditions of the poor in the tenements of New York City.

books.title: Heretics
books.author: G. K. Chesterton
books.summary: A collection of essays in which G. K. Chesterton debates the intellectuals of his day on a range of topics.

books.title: Songs of the Cattle Trail and Cow Camp
books.author: John A. Lomax
books.summary: A collection of cowboy poetry collected by folklorist John A. Lomax.

books.title: Sunshine Sketches of a Little Town
books.author: Stephen Leacock
books.summary: A humorous account of life in the fictional small town of Mariposa.

books.title: The Skylark of Space
books.author: E. E. Smith
books.summary: A scientist accidentally creates a way to travel to other star systems, while a rival scientist tries to steal all of his work.

books.title: Wild Animals I Have Known
books.author: Ernest Thompson Seton
books.summary: Eight short stories about the lives of various animals across several regions of North America.

books.title: Gitanjali
books.author: Rabindranath Tagore
books.summary: Prose poems of offering translated by the author from the original Bengali.

books.title: Recollections of Full Years
books.author: Helen Herron Taft
books.summary: Helen Herron Taft, wife of William Howard Taft, the twenty-seventh President of the United States, recalls her life married to one of America’s most influential political figures.
